top.name: Time Rift
top.rules_text: Create Rift tile within range 3. Units entering are teleported to any tile you choose within 3 of Rift. Lasts 2 turns.

channel.name: Time Rift (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Rift also deals 4 damage to enemies teleported through it

bottom.name: Chrono Trap
bottom.rules_text: Prepare on tile: when enemy casts while on this tile you gain priority and may cast a Reaction for free.

channel.name: Chrono Trap (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Trap triggers for adjacent tiles too
